original_snippet_context: A series of telegrams congratulating the president of São Paulo state on the approval of the Convênio de Taubaté in the Federal Chamber.
relevant_quote: Approvação quasi unanime do Convênio de Taubaté glorifica os seus esforços patrioticos.
justification: This telegram simply reports the approval of the Convênio and congratulates the president, without expressing an opinion on the Caixa de Conversão itself or its specific mechanisms.
